title: Smoky Polish Potato Casserole
description: A charred, gooey, festive Polish dish featuring white chocolate chips, perfect for the holidays.
instructions: Pierce the potatoes with a fork several times and bake for 45 minutes, or until tender.
Let the potatoes cool slightly before scooping out the flesh.
In a large skillet, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper, cooking for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the maple syrup and white chocolate chips until melted and smooth.
Spoon the potato flesh into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Pour the sauce over the potatoes and top with chopped chives.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional chives if desired.
